icl_examples.title: Print Letter H
icl_examples.question: Print the letter 'H' (ASCII 72) to stdout.
icl_examples.program:
Romeo, a hero.
Juliet, a lady.

Act I: Output.
Scene I: Print.

Enter Romeo and Juliet.

Romeo:
You are 72.
Speak your mind.

Exeunt.

icl_examples.title: Print Number 5
icl_examples.question: Print the number 5 to stdout.
icl_examples.program:
Romeo, a hero.
Juliet, a lady.

Act I: Output.
Scene I: Print.

Enter Romeo and Juliet.

Romeo:
You are 5.
Open your heart.

Exeunt.
